jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at WelcomHeritage
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, WelcomHeritage in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About WelcomHeritage:
WelcomHeritage is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WelcomHeritage!
